page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at a baseline frequency of 2.5 GHz. The instance features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing a total of 64 vCPUs. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The server runs on the KVM hypervisor.

A key characteristic of this instance is its integrated local storage, which consists of 15,358 GB of SSD capacity. This high-density local storage is bundled directly with the hardware profile, eliminating the need for external block storage attachments for primary data operations. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Given the high ratio of local SSD storage and memory relative to the CPU core count, the ecs.i2ne.16xlarge offers resource density optimized for data-intensive applications. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource sharing. This hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, high-throughput transactional systems, and data warehousing workloads that require low-latency access to massive local storage volumes.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at 2.5 GHz, delivering 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside a substantial 15,358 GB of bundled local SSD storage. For network connectivity, the instance supports a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. With its high-density local storage and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for data-intensive workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, transactional systems, and data warehousing applications that demand significant local storage capacity and consistent processing performance.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 server featuring sixty-four physical cores, half a terabyte of memory, and fifteen terabytes of local SSD storage.

512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
15,358 GB of bundled local SSD storage for high-capacity local data access.

Optimized for large-scale databases, transactional systems, and data warehousing.
